metadata.description: Microsoft Sentinel scheduled analytic rules for the Euno capability-native agent governance pilot. Implements the detections called out in Sprint 3-5 of the execution plan: denied-action spikes, write attempts under read-only mode, repeated invalid tokens, and kill-switch activation.
Name of the Log Analytics workspace onboarded to Microsoft Sentinel.

Sprint 6 tuned default. Number of capability denials within 5 minutes from the same agent/session that constitutes a spike. Raise if false-positive rate > 40 %; see docs/SPRINT_6_STABILIZATION_HANDOFF.md § 4.
Sprint 6 tuned default (raised from the conservative 20 to reduce clock-skew false positives during pod restarts). Number of invalid/expired tokens within 5 minutes that constitutes a burst.

Sprint 6 tuned default (raised from the conservative 10 to absorb routine bulk-revocation playbooks during incident response). Number of admin-API revocations within 5 minutes that constitutes a spike.
Sprint 6: keep enabled. Zero false positives during hypercare; this rule is high-signal by construction.
Sprint 6: keep enabled. Operational safety net; always on.

properties.displayName: Euno - Capability denial spike from a single agent/session
properties.description: Five or more capability-token denials within five minutes from the same agent or session. Possible prompt-injection attempt or runaway agent loop.
properties.query:
[concat('ContainerLogV2
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where LogMessage has "Action denied" or LogMessage has "AUTHORIZATION_FAILED" or LogMessage has "INVALID_TOKEN"
// Audit log lines are JSON; the regular logger uses winston''s simple format,
// so its lines have a JSON suffix.  Extract the trailing JSON object first.
| extend payloadJson = extract(@"(\{.*\})\s*$", 1, LogMessage)
| extend payload = parse_json(payloadJson)
| where isnotnull(payload)
| extend agentId = tostring(payload.agentId), sessionId = coalesce(tostring(payload.metadata.sessionId), tostring(payload.sessionId))
| where isnotempty(sessionId) or isnotempty(agentId)
| summarize Denials = count() by sessionId, agentId, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where Denials >= ', string(parameters('denialSpikeThreshold')))]

properties.displayName: Euno - Write attempt from a read-only session
properties.description: An agent session that was issued only read scopes attempted a write operation. Indicates either a buggy agent or an active jailbreak attempt.
properties.query:
ContainerLogV2
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
// Target the audit logger schema (logType=='audit'), which is emitted as pure
// JSON.  This matches the records produced by EnforcementEngine.logDenial().
| extend payloadJson = extract(@'(\{.*\})\s*$', 1, LogMessage)
| extend payload = parse_json(payloadJson)
| where isnotnull(payload)
| where tostring(payload.logType) == 'audit'
| extend decision = tostring(payload.decision), action = tostring(payload.action), reason = tostring(payload.reason), agentId = tostring(payload.agentId), sessionId = coalesce(tostring(payload.metadata.sessionId), tostring(payload.sessionId))
| where decision == 'deny'
| where action in ('write','delete','update','create')
| where reason has 'Insufficient permissions' or reason has 'Invalid audience'
| where isnotempty(sessionId)
| project TimeGenerated, sessionId, agentId, action, reason, _ResourceId

properties.displayName: Euno - Burst of invalid capability tokens
properties.description: Burst of invalid-signature or expired-token errors in a 5-minute window (default threshold tuned by Sprint 6 to 30; see invalidTokenBurstThreshold parameter). Possible token-forgery attempt or a clock-skew incident in the fleet.
properties.query:
[concat('ContainerLogV2
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where LogMessage has "INVALID_TOKEN" or LogMessage has "EXPIRED_TOKEN" or LogMessage has "invalid signature"
| summarize InvalidTokens = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), _ResourceId
| where InvalidTokens > ', string(parameters('invalidTokenBurstThreshold')))]

properties.description: Operational event: an admin activated the global, session-scoped, or agent-scoped kill switch. Forwarded as an incident so the on-call channel always sees a record.
properties.query:
ContainerLogV2
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where LogMessage has 'Kill switch activated' or LogMessage has 'KILL_ALL_AGENTS' or LogMessage has 'kill switch enabled'
| project TimeGenerated, _ResourceId, LogMessage

properties.description: Token revocations through the admin API within 5 minutes exceed the configured threshold (default tuned by Sprint 6 to 15; see revocationSpikeThreshold parameter). Could indicate an automated incident-response action or an attacker abusing operator credentials.
properties.query:
[concat('ContainerLogV2
| where TimeGenerated > ago(10m)
| where LogMessage has "Token revoked via admin API"
| summarize Revocations = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where Revocations > ', string(parameters('revocationSpikeThreshold')))]
